mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_snapshot (project_id, node_id, health_status, health_detail, process_status, process_pid, cpu_percent, memory_mb, heap_used_mb, heap_max_mb, gc_count, gc_time_ms, response_ms, host_cpu_percent, host_memory_percent, disk_usage_percent, extra_json, collect_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{healthStatus}, #{healthDetail}, #{processStatus}, #{processPid}, #{cpuPercent}, #{memoryMb}, #{heapUsedMb}, #{heapMaxMb}, #{gcCount}, #{gcTimeMs}, #{responseMs}, #{hostCpuPercent}, #{hostMemoryPercent}, #{diskUsagePercent}, #{extraJson}, #{collectTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM monitor_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND node_id = #{nodeId} ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
